_comment: Shared drift fixture (HomeOps plan §4.1). Read by both the backend pytest suite (app.domain.recurrence) and the @homeops/core Vitest suite (recurrence.ts). All dates are UTC calendar dates; rules carry no DTSTART, so `after` is the anchor. Keep the two implementations in lockstep: a change here must pass on both sides.

next_occurrence.name: monthly BYMONTHDAY=15 rolls to next month
monthly BYMONTHDAY=15 is strictly after the anchor
monthly BYMONTHDAY=31 skips months without a 31st (iCal semantics)
